overview: GrowthOS is a premium SaaS dashboard for digital marketing agencies — an AI-powered command center for lead generation, campaign management, SEO, analytics, proposals, and client growth. Built with a hand-crafted premium UI that feels like it was engineered by senior developers.
features: Premium dark/light mode dashboard with KPI cards and sparklines
Lead Engine with scoring, filters, and pitch sending
Campaign builder wizard for multi-platform ad campaigns
SEO Center with audits, keyword tracking, and blog generator
Analytics with revenue-first charts and funnel visualization
Social Hub connecting YouTube, Instagram, Facebook, LinkedIn, and more
Unified WhatsApp + Email inbox with AI reply suggestions
Proposal builder with ₹15k/₹25k/₹50k pricing packages and ROI calculator
Client growth strategy dashboard with monthly reports
Automation workflow builder with pre-built templates
